headline: Here's What to Expect From Otis Worldwide's Next Earnings Report
summary: Otis Worldwide will release its second-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a single-digit profit dip.

raw.headline: Here's What to Expect From Otis Worldwide's Next Earnings Report
raw.summary: Otis Worldwide will release its second-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a single-digit profit dip.

headline: Otis introduces Gen3™ elevator modernisation solutions in EMEA
summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS), the global leader in the manufacture, installation, service and modernisation of elevators and escalators, today announced the introduction of Otis Gen3 MOD solutions in Europe, the Middle East and Africa (EMEA). Otis Gen3 MOD solutions are already available in the U.S., Canada and Asia.
